narrative:
Rushcreek Twp township has 2,636 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.0 percentage points.
